", "highlights": "

Keep your baby’s feeding essentials hygienically clean with the Philips Avent Bottle Steriliser and Dryer Premium. Designed for busy parents, this electric steam steriliser uses powerful, chemical‑free steam to kill 99.9% of harmful germs, helping protect your baby at every feed. The complete sterilising and drying cycle takes just 40 minutes, so bottles are ready exactly when you need them.

Unlike standard baby bottle sterilisers, this all‑in‑one solution sterilises, dries, and stores bottles and accessories in one appliance. After sterilising, jets of filtered air dry bottles thoroughly before automatically switching off. When the lid remains closed, contents stay sterile for up to 24 hours, giving you flexibility throughout the day or night.

Its space‑saving yet roomy design fits up to six Philips Avent bottles and is compatible with teats, soothers, and breast pump parts, making it ideal for newborn feeding routines. An integrated drip tray prevents milk droplets from reaching the heating plate, reducing unpleasant odours and simplifying cleaning. Easy to assemble and wipe down, the Philips Avent Steriliser and Dryer Premium delivers reliable, hygienic care with minimal effort — so you can focus on what matters most: your baby.

Key Features:

• Kills 99.9% of germs using chemical‑free electric steam sterilisation

• Sterilise and dry baby bottles in 40 minutes with filtered air drying

• Fits up to six bottles and keeps items sterile for up to 24 hours

What’s in the Box

• Philips Avent Bottle Sterilizer & Dryer Premium (SCF293/01)

• User Manual

Why Choose the Philips Avent Bottle Sterilizer & Dryer?

The Philips Avent Sterilizer & Dryer offers fast 40‑minute sterilization and hygienic filtered drying with a compact, easy‑clean design for stress‑free feeding preparation.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "ENVE Bottle Warmer & Sterilizer Introducing our Baby Bottle Steam Warmer and Sterilizer – a multifunctional solution designed to meet the diverse needs of modern parents. This innovative device combines the convenience of quick bottle warming with the essential function of thorough sterilization, ensuring your baby's feeding essentials are clean and ready to use. Key Features: • 3-in-1 Functionality: This device combines three essential functions in one – bottle warming, sterilizing, and food warming. It's the ultimate time-saving companion for busy parents, streamlining your daily routine with ease. • Steam Technology: The steam heating technology ensures quick and even warming for your baby's bottle or food. Say goodbye to uneven heating worries, as the gentle steam heat preserves essential nutrients while providing the perfect temperature for feeding. • Sterilization Capability: Safeguard your baby's health with the sterilization feature that eliminates harmful bacteria and germs from bottles, nipples, pacifiers, and other small accessories. The steam sterilization process is quick, effective, and chemical-free, ensuring a clean and safe environment for your little one. • Food Warming Convenience: Beyond bottle warming, our device offers a dedicated food warming function. Easily warm up baby food jars or pouches, making mealtime a breeze whether you're at home or on the go. Enjoy the flexibility to provide your baby with warm, nourishing meals wherever you are. • User-Friendly Interface: The intuitive control panel allows for hassle-free operation. Select your desired function, set the timer, and let the device do the rest. The digital display provides clear information, and the one-touch buttons make adjusting settings a breeze. • Smart Safety Features: Prioritizing your baby's safety, our steam warmer and sterilizer automatically shuts off after each cycle. The device is made from BPA-free materials and features a secure, cool-touch handle for easy handling during operation. • Sleek and Compact Design: With a sleek and compact design, our steam warmer and sterilizer effortlessly blends into your kitchen or nursery. The space-saving design makes it ideal for any countertop, ensuring it's always within reach when needed. Invest in the Baby Bottle Steam Warmer and Sterilizer for a versatile, time-saving solution that prioritizes the health and well-being of your little one. Streamline your daily routine with a reliable, all-in-one device that makes bottle preparation and sterilization a seamless part of your parenting journey."}]

ENVE Bottle Warmer & Sterilizer

Introducing our Baby Bottle Steam Warmer and Sterilizer – a multifunctional solution designed to meet the diverse needs of modern parents. This innovative device combines the convenience of quick bottle warming with the essential function of thorough sterilization, ensuring your baby's feeding essentials are clean and ready to use.

Key Features:

• 3-in-1 Functionality: This device combines three essential functions in one – bottle warming, sterilizing, and food warming. It's the ultimate time-saving companion for busy parents, streamlining your daily routine with ease.

• Steam Technology: The steam heating technology ensures quick and even warming for your baby's bottle or food. Say goodbye to uneven heating worries, as the gentle steam heat preserves essential nutrients while providing the perfect temperature for feeding.

• Sterilization Capability: Safeguard your baby's health with the sterilization feature that eliminates harmful bacteria and germs from bottles, nipples, pacifiers, and other small accessories. The steam sterilization process is quick, effective, and chemical-free, ensuring a clean and safe environment for your little one.

• Food Warming Convenience: Beyond bottle warming, our device offers a dedicated food warming function. Easily warm up baby food jars or pouches, making mealtime a breeze whether you're at home or on the go. Enjoy the flexibility to provide your baby with warm, nourishing meals wherever you are.

• User-Friendly Interface: The intuitive control panel allows for hassle-free operation. Select your desired function, set the timer, and let the device do the rest. The digital display provides clear information, and the one-touch buttons make adjusting settings a breeze.

• Smart Safety Features: Prioritizing your baby's safety, our steam warmer and sterilizer automatically shuts off after each cycle. The device is made from BPA-free materials and features a secure, cool-touch handle for easy handling during operation.

• Sleek and Compact Design: With a sleek and compact design, our steam warmer and sterilizer effortlessly blends into your kitchen or nursery. The space-saving design makes it ideal for any countertop, ensuring it's always within reach when needed.

Invest in the Baby Bottle Steam Warmer and Sterilizer for a versatile, time-saving solution that prioritizes the health and well-being of your little one. Streamline your daily routine with a reliable, all-in-one device that makes bottle preparation and sterilization a seamless part of your parenting journey.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Product Parameter: Name: Orzbow Baby Bottle Warmer Material: Polypropylene (PP) Inner Diameter: 98mm Rated Power: 200W Voltage: 220V Hertz: 50Hz/60Hz Suitable for Materials: Glass / Breastmilk Bag/ PP / Silicone 【Multifunction Bottle Warmer】Our portable bottle warmer is versatile, user-friendly, and capable of rapidly warming milk, thawing, sterilizing, and even maintaining milk at the optimal temperature. Baby bottle warmer is compatible with a diameter of 9.8cm bottles, as well as baby food jars and breastmilk bags. 【Fast Warming】With the bottle warmer to heat breast milk quickly. The default heating temperature of the bottle warmer is 45℃. You can adjust the heating target temperature by pressing the \"+\" or \"-\" button. It only takes 3-6 minutes for 4 oz/120 ml of milk to reach a temperature of 40°C. The heating speed depends on the milk volume and bottle material, and the heating target temperature can be adjusted appropriately according to your actual situation 【Retain Nutrients in Breastmilk】 Breast milk warmer uses gentle water heating technology instead of high-temperature steam, slowly and evenly warming breast milk to ensure the essential nutrients crucial for your baby's healthy growth are preserved, providing your baby with the best nutrition. 【48H Constant Temperature】Milk warmer for baby can keep breast milk warm for 48 hours, allowing you to prepare for feedings in advance. In addition, a night light design and a temperature display panel are added to make it easier and safer to feed at night. 【Safe & Reliable】 Portable bottle warmer comes with automatic shut-off and anti-dry burning, ensuring the safety of you and your devices. Baby milk warmer steams up to 100°C to keep bottles or baby food jars always tidy, giving the baby the best care. Multiple protection guards the safety of babies and moms! 【NOTE】1. When adding water to the bottle warmer, do not exceed 300ml to prevent leakage. 2. During cleaning, make sure the device is disconnected and cooled. 3. Avoid getting the milk warmer base wet. 4. Product Parameter:

  • Name: Orzbow Baby Bottle Warmer
  • Material: Polypropylene (PP)
  • Inner Diameter: 98mm
  • Rated Power: 200W
  • Voltage: 220V
  • Hertz: 50Hz/60Hz
  • Suitable for Materials: Glass / Breastmilk Bag/ PP / Silicone


【Multifunction Bottle Warmer】Our portable bottle warmer is versatile, user-friendly, and capable of rapidly warming milk, thawing, sterilizing, and even maintaining milk at the optimal temperature. Baby bottle warmer is compatible with a diameter of 9.8cm bottles, as well as baby food jars and breastmilk bags.

【Fast Warming】With the bottle warmer to heat breast milk quickly. The default heating temperature of the bottle warmer is 45℃. You can adjust the heating target temperature by pressing the \"+\" or \"-\" button. It only takes 3-6 minutes for 4 oz/120 ml of milk to reach a temperature of 40°C. The heating speed depends on the milk volume and bottle material, and the heating target temperature can be adjusted appropriately according to your actual situation

【Retain Nutrients in Breastmilk】 Breast milk warmer uses gentle water heating technology instead of high-temperature steam, slowly and evenly warming breast milk to ensure the essential nutrients crucial for your baby's healthy growth are preserved, providing your baby with the best nutrition.

【48H Constant Temperature】Milk warmer for baby can keep breast milk warm for 48 hours, allowing you to prepare for feedings in advance. In addition, a night light design and a temperature display panel are added to make it easier and safer to feed at night.

【Safe & Reliable】 Portable bottle warmer comes with automatic shut-off and anti-dry burning, ensuring the safety of you and your devices. Baby milk warmer steams up to 100°C to keep bottles or baby food jars always tidy, giving the baby the best care. Multiple protection guards the safety of babies and moms!

【NOTE】1. When adding water to the bottle warmer, do not exceed 300ml to prevent leakage. 2. During cleaning, make sure the device is disconnected and cooled. 3. Avoid getting the milk warmer base wet. 4. For optimal heating efficiency, clean the heating plate with vinegar or descaling agent every 2 weeks.

标题: Lollababy On-The-Go Essentials (Portable Bottle Warmer & UV Sterilising Pod + EVA Mesh Pouch)
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Travel Bundle (Nasal Aspirator & Portable Bottle Warmer) U.P $274 LOLLABABY UV STERILISING POD / MINI UV STERILISER The Lollababy UV Sterilising Pod makes sterilising on the go a breeze! Designed to sterilise small items such as pacifiers and teats within 60 seconds, now you can have a peace of mind anywhere with this mini UV steriliser. Functions: 60 seconds sterilisation, 180 seconds sterilisation Comes with 1 Year Warranty. LOLLABABY SWIRLPRO PORTABLE BOTTLE WARMER Lollababy SwirlPro™ Portable Bottle Warmer – the game-changer for busy parents on the go! Our bottle warmer is designed to quickly warm up liquids, ensuring that your little one has perfectly warmed milk anytime and anywhere. Introducing the world’s first bottle warmer with a swirling function – SwirlPro™ Portable Bottle Warmer! For breastfeeding mummies, did you know that fat emulsions in breastmilk will separate into layers after being chilled? With its unique swirling mechanism, the SwirlPro™ can help to mix the fat emulsions in chilled breastmilk evenly while warming. • No adaptor necessary For: 1. AVENT 2. SpeCtra *Note: Glass bottles are not compatible with this bottle warmer without an adaptor."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/a4a53b756e1afff883ec4db9fa98f3e0.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Easy to wash. Safety Features: Automatic Power Off Dry Heating Protection Overheating Fuse Protection Battery Overcharge Protection Technical Specs: 8800mAh (2 x 7.4V/4400mAh) Li-ion Battery Battery Capacity 8800mAh Charging Time 2A-6h, 3A-4h 2-6 warming times per full charge. Bottle Warmer Kit contains: • 1 Bottle Warmer Unit • 1 Dust Cover • 1 USB Cable • 2 Sealing Ring FAQs About Bottle Warmer Charging Q: How long do I need to charge the device for 1st-time use? As per common belief, people charge their new devices the very first time by typically draining it out and then charging it for 8 to 12 hours non-stop. This behavior may have been true in the era of nickel batteries, however, you need not resort to such practice for today’s lithium-ion batteries. Lollababy Bottle Warmer uses lithium-ion hence there is no need to drain and charge it for 8 to 12 hours non-stop. You may stop charging the device once it is fully charged. Q: What does the display “Lo” mean? “Lo” is displayed to warn that the battery is less than 20% and has to be recharged. When “Lo” displays, it would power off after blinking for 6 seconds. Q: How long will it take to charge the bottle warmer? We recommend that you use a 3A power adaptor for charging as it will take between 3-4 hours. For the 2A power adaptor, it will take at least 6 hours for charging. For a 1A power adaptor, it will take at least 8 hours for charging. Q: How do I know if it is fully charged? “100” is displayed to inform you that it is fully charged. USE Q: Do I need an adaptor? The below list of bottles does not require an adaptor. • Compatible Wide-Neck Baby Bottle Brand List: 1. AVENT 2. Richell 3. Combi 4. SpeCtra 5. Nip 6. Chicco Q: What adaptor do I need if it is not compatible?"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/77f2e3983eab13097413539f9d548898.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "For Hegen Bottles, Hegen PCTO™ Wide-Neck Adapter is needed. This can be purchased from Hegen. Q: What liquids can it warm? All liquids like water, breast milk, fresh milk, etc. can be warm using the bottle warmer. Q: How do I wash the bottle warmer? You can use your dishwashing detergent to wash the stainless steel part that comes into contact with the liquids. However, please ensure that the charging port cover is closed when washing it under the tap. Do NOT immerse the bottle warmer in water or any other liquids. Q: Can I sterilize the bottle warmer? You may only use a UV sterilizer without the drying function to sterilize the bottle warmer. The drying function of UV Steriliser is not recommended as there is a lithium-ion battery in the device. Pouring hot boiling water over the stainless steel part is ok but do ensure that the charging port cover is closed to prevent water from entering the battery causing damage."}]

Travel Bundle (Nasal Aspirator & Portable Bottle Warmer) U.P $274

LOLLABABY UV STERILISING POD / MINI UV STERILISER

The Lollababy UV Sterilising Pod makes sterilising on the go a breeze! Designed to sterilise small items such as pacifiers and teats within 60 seconds, now you can have a peace of mind anywhere with this mini UV steriliser.

Functions: 60 seconds sterilisation, 180 seconds sterilisation

Comes with 1 Year Warranty.

LOLLABABY SWIRLPRO PORTABLE BOTTLE WARMER

Lollababy SwirlPro™ Portable Bottle Warmer – the game-changer for busy parents on the go!

Our bottle warmer is designed to quickly warm up liquids, ensuring that your little one has perfectly warmed milk anytime and anywhere.

Introducing the world’s first bottle warmer with a swirling function – SwirlPro™ Portable Bottle Warmer!

For breastfeeding mummies, did you know that fat emulsions in breastmilk will separate into layers after being chilled? With its unique swirling mechanism, the SwirlPro™ can help to mix the fat emulsions in chilled breastmilk evenly while warming.

• No adaptor necessary For:

1. AVENT

2. SpeCtra

*Note: Glass bottles are not compatible with this bottle warmer without an adaptor.

Easy to wash.

Safety Features:

Automatic Power Off

Dry Heating Protection

Overheating Fuse Protection

Battery Overcharge Protection

Technical Specs:

8800mAh (2 x 7.4V/4400mAh) Li-ion Battery

Battery Capacity 8800mAh

Charging Time 2A-6h, 3A-4h

2-6 warming times per full charge.

Bottle Warmer Kit contains:

• 1 Bottle Warmer Unit

• 1 Dust Cover

• 1 USB Cable

• 2 Sealing Ring

FAQs About Bottle Warmer

Charging

Q: How long do I need to charge the device for 1st-time use?

As per common belief, people charge their new devices the very first time by typically draining it out and then charging it for 8 to 12 hours non-stop. This behavior may have been true in the era of nickel batteries, however, you need not resort to such practice for today’s lithium-ion batteries. Lollababy Bottle Warmer uses lithium-ion hence there is no need to drain and charge it for 8 to 12 hours non-stop. You may stop charging the device once it is fully charged.

Q: What does the display “Lo” mean?

“Lo” is displayed to warn that the battery is less than 20% and has to be recharged. When “Lo” displays, it would power off after blinking for 6 seconds.

Q: How long will it take to charge the bottle warmer?

We recommend that you use a 3A power adaptor for charging as it will take between 3-4 hours.

For the 2A power adaptor, it will take at least 6 hours for charging.

For a 1A power adaptor, it will take at least 8 hours for charging.

Q: How do I know if it is fully charged?

“100” is displayed to inform you that it is fully charged.

USE

Q: Do I need an adaptor?

The below list of bottles does not require an adaptor.

• Compatible Wide-Neck Baby Bottle Brand List:

1. AVENT

2. Richell

3. Combi

4. SpeCtra

5. Nip

6. Chicco

Q: What adaptor do I need if it is not compatible?

For Hegen Bottles, Hegen PCTO™ Wide-Neck Adapter is needed. This can be purchased from Hegen.

Q: What liquids can it warm?

All liquids like water, breast milk, fresh milk, etc. can be warm using the bottle warmer.

Q: How do I wash the bottle warmer?

You can use your dishwashing detergent to wash the stainless steel part that comes into contact with the liquids. However, please ensure that the charging port cover is closed when washing it under the tap. Do NOT immerse the bottle warmer in water or any other liquids.

Q: Can I sterilize the bottle warmer?

You may only use a UV sterilizer without the drying function to sterilize the bottle warmer. The drying function of UV Steriliser is not recommended as there is a lithium-ion battery in the device.

Pouring hot boiling water over the stainless steel part is ok but do ensure that the charging port cover is closed to prevent water from entering the battery causing damage.
